name: ux-lab-repeatable-same-message-tui-mirror
scope: Repeatable UX Lab #tau live same-message chat and visible TUI mirror synchronization proof runner

commands.summary: Live browser proof submitted the COMPLIANCE prompt and asserted chat handoff, visible same-turn route/stages, unique visible stage qids, receipt stream presence, and Memory /intent plus /recall HTTP 200s.

proves: The same-message visible TUI mirror proof is now repeatable through a checked-in UX Lab script.
A live Tau chat COMPLIANCE turn renders tau.agent_handoff.v1 in the chat well.
The side TUI mirror shows the same-turn Memory route, next agent, and visible stage list for that same browser turn.
Visible TUI stage qids are unique even when repeated stage names appear during transition.
The live receipt stream remains present alongside the same-turn mirror.
does_not_prove: Applied GitHub mutation for this browser turn.
Semantic correctness of the evidence case.
Full UX Lab TypeScript health outside the focused Tau slice.
